brigade.character: a lobster chef de cuisine in command whites
brigade.action: reviewing and approving one master order ticket at the pass before clipping it to the ticket rail

n8n-ops.action: tracing a few large hand-inked workflow steps across one open ledger page

agentpantry.character: a lobster chef in kitchen whites
agentpantry.action: checking a few labelled jars on a pantry shelf with a clipboard

postiz.action: pinning two or three posts onto an open scheduling board

watchtower.character: a lobster keeper with a spyglass in a small open watchtower

hotwash.character: a lobster operator in a headset
hotwash.action: reviewing one map sheet at a calm situation table

content-guard.character: an inspector crab with a magnifying glass
content-guard.action: stamping a single document at the pass

code-search.character: a llama wearing a small brass collar
code-search.action: reading a few floating index cards of short code snippets and file paths by lamplight, searching the stacks

vervet.action: watching a quiet network of a few hand-inked nodes

maltego.action: an investigator desk linking a few index cards with clean hand-drawn lines, the cards labelled only with redacted placeholder fields like SUBJECT, EMAIL and PHONE and no real data

cortex.action: an analyst desk with one large loosely painted brain study and a few notes

zeek.action: an open notebook with a sparse network traffic map of a few labelled nodes, using only 192.0.2.x example addresses

prompt-library.action: filing one card into a card-catalog drawer

memory-doctor.character: a lobster doctor in a white coat with a stethoscope
memory-doctor.action: examining a card-catalog drawer of recipe cards, listening to one card with the stethoscope

miseledger.character: a lobster bookkeeper with a quill
miseledger.action: writing a few labelled entries into one large open ledger book on a desk

stationtrail.action: gathering a few order tickets from a row of kitchen stations onto one ticket rail

sourceharvest.character: a lobster forager with a harvest basket
sourceharvest.action: gathering a few labelled crates of produce into one basket

skillet.character: a lobster chef holding a cast-iron skillet
skillet.action: arranging a few labelled prep bowls of mise en place beside the cast-iron skillet on the line

graphtrail.action: tracing a route across a hand-inked wall map of a few labelled connected nodes

cloche.action: lifting a silver cloche dome to reveal one finished plated dish

plating.character: a lobster chef with fine chef's tweezers
plating.action: placing one garnish onto a finished plated dish with the tweezers

mise-en-scene.action: arranging a few props on a small staged tabletop scene under one spotlight

bootstrap-doctor.character: a lobster medic with a clipboard
bootstrap-doctor.action: running a startup checklist on a freshly prepped kitchen station, ticking a few items

agent-notify.action: ringing the brass pass bell to call service at the pass

code-search-mcp.character: a llama wearing a small brass collar
code-search-mcp.action: passing a few labelled index cards of code snippets through a service hatch

upstream-drift.action: comparing two delivery manifests on a clipboard and marking the few lines that changed

escoffier-fleet-kit.action: laying out a roll of labelled kitchen tools, the batterie de cuisine, on the bench

tokenjuice.action: tending a reducing pot on the stove, concentrating a tall pour of bright juice down to a single small glass of essence
